title: Implement CLI flags, parser hardening, and redaction
description: Implement CLI flags and wiring: --allow-external, --allow-network-tests, --dry-run, --apply. Map env var GSTACK_AI_ALLOW_EXTERNAL to CLI behavior. Implement typed confirmations for external/apply/network tests. Harden Output Parser with AST-based checks to detect and block network/OS/subprocess usage. Implement redaction/secret detection and include redaction entries in metadata. Add gstack-ai-test show-redactions <generation-id> CLI command. Implement per-generation backups under .gstack_gen/backups/<generation-id>/ for revert.
